/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/lab2.dir/lab2_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lab2.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lab2.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lab2.dir/addfiledialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lab2.dir/ImportWindow.cpp.o -o lab2.app/Contents/MacOS/lab2 -F/Users/rodoet/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/rodoet/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib /Users/rodoet/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/rodoet/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/rodoet/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
